ddls:
CREATE TABLE "leagues" (
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each league */,
  "league_name" TEXT /* Name of the league */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the league */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the league was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the league */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the league's logo */,
  "country" TEXT /* Country where the league is based */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "teams" (
  "team_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each team */,
  "team_name" TEXT /* Name of the team */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the team belongs to */,
  "coach" TEXT /* Name of the team coach */,
  "stadium" TEXT /* Name of the team stadium */,
  "founded_year" INTEGER /* Year the team was founded */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the team */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the team's logo */,
  "stadium_capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the team's stadium */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the team plays home matches */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_teams_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "matches" (
  "match_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match */,
  "league_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the league the match belongs to */,
  "round_number" INTEGER /* Round number of the match */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date and time of the match */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the match */,
  "home_team" INTEGER /* ID of the home team */,
  "away_team" INTEGER /* ID of the away team */,
  "group" TEXT /* Group or stage of the match (e.g., group stage, knockout stage) */,
  "weather_conditions" TEXT /* Weather conditions during the match */,
  "attendance" INTEGER /* Number of spectators at the match */,
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the stadium where the match was played */,
  "referee" TEXT /* Name of the referee officiating the match */,
  "assistant_referee_1" TEXT /* Name of the first assistant referee */,
  "assistant_referee_2" TEXT /* Name of the second assistant referee */,
  "fourth_official" TEXT /* Name of the fourth official */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., scheduled, in progress, completed) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("match_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_league_id FOREIGN KEY ("league_id") REFERENCES leagues ("league_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_stadium_id FOREIGN KEY ("stadium_id") REFERENCES stadiums ("stadium_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_away_team FOREIGN KEY ("away_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_matches_home_team FOREIGN KEY ("home_team") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "match_outcomes" (
  "outcome_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each match outcome */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the outcome belongs to */,
  "home_score" INTEGER /* Score of the home team */,
  "away_score" INTEGER /* Score of the away team */,
  "winner" TEXT /* Winner of the match (e.g., home team, away team, draw) */,
  "penalties" INTEGER /* Number of penalty kicks taken */,
  "penalties_scored" INTEGER /* Number of penalty kicks scored */,
  "extra_time" INTEGER /* Whether extra time was played */,
  "match_status" TEXT /* Status of the match (e.g., completed, abandoned) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("outcome_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_match_outcomes_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "players" (
  "player_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player */,
  "player_name" TEXT /* Name of the player */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the player belongs to */,
  "position" TEXT /* Position of the player (e.g., goalkeeper, defender, midfielder, forward) */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the player */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the player */,
  "height" INTEGER /* Height of the player in centimeters */,
  "weight" INTEGER /* Weight of the player in kilograms */,
  "shirt_number" INTEGER /* Shirt number of the player */,
  "preferred_foot" TEXT /* Preferred foot of the player (left, right) */,
  "contract_start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the player's contract */,
  "contract_end_date" TEXT /* End date of the player's contract */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_players_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "player_statistics" (
  "statistic_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each player statistic */,
  "player_id" INTEGER /* ID of the player the statistic belongs to */,
  "match_id" INTEGER /* ID of the match the statistic belongs to */,
  "goals" INTEGER /* Number of goals scored by the player */,
  "assists" INTEGER /* Number of assists made by the player */,
  "yellow_cards" INTEGER /* Number of yellow cards received by the player */,
  "red_cards" INTEGER /* Number of red cards received by the player */,
  "minutes_played" INTEGER /* Number of minutes the player played in the match */,
  "shots_on_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots on target */,
  "shots_off_target" INTEGER /* Number of shots off target */,
  "fouls_committed" INTEGER /* Number of fouls committed by the player */,
  "fouls_suffered" INTEGER /* Number of fouls suffered by the player */,
  "offsides" INTEGER /* Number of offside instances */,
  "tackles" INTEGER /* Number of tackles made by the player */,
  "interceptions" INTEGER /* Number of interceptions made by the player */,
  "passes_completed" INTEGER /* Number of passes completed */,
  "passes_attempted" INTEGER /* Number of passes attempted */,
  "pass_accuracy" REAL /* Pass accuracy as a percentage */,
  "dribbles" INTEGER /* Number of dribbles made by the player */,
  "dribbles_success" INTEGER /* Number of successful dribbles */,
  "saves" INTEGER /* Number of saves made by the player (if a goalkeeper) */,
  "clean_sheets" INTEGER /* Number of clean sheets (if a goalkeeper) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("statistic_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_player_id FOREIGN KEY ("player_id") REFERENCES players ("player_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_player_statistics_match_id FOREIGN KEY ("match_id") REFERENCES matches ("match_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "coaches" (
  "coach_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each coach */,
  "coach_name" TEXT /* Name of the coach */,
  "team_id" INTEGER /* ID of the team the coach manages */,
  "date_of_birth" TEXT /* Date of birth of the coach */,
  "nationality" TEXT /* Nationality of the coach */,
  "date_hired" TEXT /* Date the coach was hired */,
  "date_left" TEXT /* Date the coach left the team (if applicable) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("coach_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_coaches_team_id FOREIGN KEY ("team_id") REFERENCES teams ("team_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stadiums" (
  "stadium_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stadium */,
  "stadium_name" TEXT /* Name of the stadium */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the stadium */,
  "capacity" INTEGER /* Capacity of the stadium */,
  "built_year" INTEGER /* Year the stadium was built */,
  "website" TEXT /* Official website of the stadium */,
  "logo_url" TEXT /* URL to the stadium's logo */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stadium_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., administrator, coach, analyst) */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the user's last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time the user account was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)
